titleStmt.title: SII 15.248: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 248. (B.K. No. 118 of 1929-30.) BAILŪR, HONAWAR TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab lying in the Mārkaṇḍēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1356, Pramādi, Kārttika ba. 10, Sunday. The datails corresponds to 1433 A.D., November 6, the Śaka year being current. The weekday, however, was Friday.
The contents of the record are the same as in No. 247 above. This seems to be almost a copy of it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī gaṇādhipatāEṁ nama namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya ṣa
ṁbhavē svasti śrīmadu rājādhirājaparamēsvara śrī vīrapratāpa
dēvarāya mahārāyara vijayasāṁbrājyādbhudayadalu
śrī manumahāpradhāna puruśōttamadēva Oḍeyaru bārakūra
rājadhāniyalu Idu tuḷurājyavanu pratipālisutaṁ vidu
sakhavaruṣa 1356 ya pramādīca saṁvatsarada kā¨rttika ba 10 Alu
śrīmatu Adhikāri saṁṇunāyaru bailūra dēsasamastaru ku
ḍi śrī maḍakēsvaradēvastānadali nityapurāṇa naḍevaṁtāgi bareyi
sida dha¨rmmasāsanada bhāśākramaveṁtaṁdare A dēsasamastaru gujā
ḍiya kēśavana maga nārāyaṇabhaṭṭariṁge I purāṇava naḍasuva
ṁtāgi A caṁdrā¨rkkatsāviyāgi dhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi mulava Eṟe
du koṭṭa dha¨rmmastaḷaṁgaḍi muḍalu [Asa]ya gade teṁkalu
vrittiya gaḍi paḍuvalu bēli baḍagalu Agrada vritti
lu Iṁti nālukaṁ gaḍiyiṁda Oḷaguḷamane maneṭhāU Aṁgo
� . Aṁgasasi nīrudāri mattaṁ Eḍagulageya bāḷiṁge gaḍi muḍalu
hoḷa teṁkalu kuṁIṇa hebārana makkaḷa Uratti paḍuvalu sīme
ḷu parapaḷināyaka madikuva viṣu narasiṁhmanadāḍa tanabhā
habāra makaḷu [I]varellara vrittiyu Appaya gadeya hāḷi
Iṁtī nālkugaḍiyiṁda Oḷage Uḷa vrittimaṁ naṭṭu nā
gadai bāriṁge baṁda Eḍasalageya kaṭṭina nīru sava
mattaṁ kārugāla bāḷiṁ geludā kaṭṭiya bāḷiṁge U
dalu Akkidēsvada hāḷi saṁnyasiga vritti teṁkalu sanyāsiga
valu harida hoḷa baḍagalu heriya dēvasva Iṁtī nā
Iṁda guḷa vrittimaṁ gaṣṭu śrī garu koṭṭaru hā 20 va�
dēśadavaru koṭṭadu 4 ḍe gadde Idakke baṁda Erasalageya kaṭṭina nīrudā
ri Aṁtiṣṭuṁ [E]lla Usa hā 40 gaṭṭe mu 12 hā 20 ne gadda mana
manaṭhāU Aṁgoḍu Aṁga dāri nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāśāṇa Akṣiṇi
Agāmi siddha sādhya sahitavāgi Ellavanu Ā caṁdrā¨rkkasthāviyāgi
śrīmaḍakēsvaradēvara sthānadalli nityapurāṇanaḍavaṁtāgiyu surēsvara śrī
padaṁgaḷa maṭhadalli sōṇi di 30 purāṇa naḍavaṁtāgi Ā śrīpadaṁgaḷu dē
ṣasamastaru gujāḍiya nārāyaṇabhaṭṭariṁge Ā caṁdrā¨rkkasthāviyūgi dhā
rāpū¨rvvakavāgi mulava Eṟadu koṭṭaru dēvasthānadalli
nityapurāṇa naḍevaṁtāgi maṭhadalli sōṇi 30 dina purāṇava naḍa
suvaṁtāgi māḍikoṁḍu Iṣṭanallavanu dhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi
mulava EṟeĪsikoṁḍaru nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaru Eṟadu koṭṭa
sthaḷaṁgaḷiṁge taṟu muḍa dēvara dha¨rmma Arugaḍi mane haṇa
naga haṇa Okkalu guttage kāṇike khaḍāya beḷākaraṇa beḷu
daṁḍa Esa Osage biṭṭibiḍāra Ettu gāyi modalāgi Au
dū salla sa¨rvvamānyavāgi dēṣasamastaru kāIda kā
ṁgaḷu koṭṭa dha¨rmma sthaḷakeU dēṣa samastaru Oppisa
gi kāIda kāhu I dha¨rmmasthaḷaṁgaḷanu purāṇa
taṁnna taṁna saṁtati saṁtati Uḷaṁnabare hiriya rā
Acaṁdrā¨rkkasthāviyogi sthukhadiṁ bāḷuvaru hu
salu salla koṭṭavana A¨rtta salla Uru samastaru ta
dēvakā¨ryya pitrukā¨ryya maduve Upanayana
ṇava naḍasuva bhaṭṭara hēḷiE māḍuvaru nārā
nina kaiyalu Aṁnigara kaiyalu māḍi ko
viḍidu dēsadavaru vūkalu guttage Arugaḍiya
I nārāyaṇabhaṭṭara kūḍe baṁda hāṁge teṟa
I dha¨rmmake Arū tpūdu salla tapidavaru
ru taṁmma mātāpitrugaḷa śrīvāraṇā
hōharu I dha¨rmmava pālsidaru śrīmaḍakē
ḍisi vāraṇāsiyalu taṁma māta pi
ra kapileyanu sabrāṁhmaṇariṁge dāna mā varu
purāṇa Eṁdeṁdū naḍavaṁtāgi Adhikāri nāyarū Ā
dēṣa samastaranu Oḍaṁbaḍisi barasida dha¨rmmasāsana ttāṁ paradattāṁ vvā bra
ṁhmasvaṁ harēti ca ya saṣṭiṁ varuṣa sayasahaṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
krimi dānapālanayō¨rmmadhyēdānācchrēyōnupālana dānātusva¨rga
punōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ Adityacaṁdrāva
Ubhē ¨rbbhūmi hridayaṁ yamaśca Aha
triśca dha¨rmmaścajānāti narasya
ca saṁdhyē Iṁtappudake sākṣigaḷu sākṣigaḷu bāḷe nārāyaṇa beṁṇi sa
mādhava jētiya nārāyaṇa Iṁtivara U
bhayonmatadiṁ śrī maḍakēsvaradēvara saṁnidhiyalli
siriyāliya nāḍa gaṇapaṁṇa sēnabōvanaḷiga kēṣava
na baraha sāsana māḍidava kōṭijana maga Isarācari
Digital edition of SII 15.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
